critical_findings.impact: Cannot derive governed decision/trust/findings deterministically from checkpoint note alone.
critical_findings.minimal_fix: Regenerate full Claude review output with explicit verdict rubric, trust assessment, and required fixes.

required_fixes.description: Produce complete review output including decision, trust assessment, and actionable findings.

watch_items: Keep stabilization notes and governed review artifacts separate to avoid metadata loss.
failure_mode_summary: Checkpoint note lacked required governed review fields; artifact is blocked pending complete review output.
